ModulePrefs.title: Blank HTML Form
ModulePrefs.author: Your Name
ModulePrefs.description: A simple blank HTML form inside an XML gadget.

Module.Content: <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title></title> </head> <body> fuh naw sir </body> </html>
